message:
test(fcp-conformance/lease-coord-helpers): pin detect_conflicts + should_renew (br-6e1cw)

Two LeaseCoordinator helpers complementing br-9nee8 (acquire/renew/
release): detect_conflicts surfaces overlapping active leases for
split-brain triage; should_renew tells the holder when to refresh.

Adds 13 tests pinning conflict-detection (none for 0/1 active, all
holders surfaced when 2+, resolution names winner, expired excluded,
severity Critical/Warning from config) and should_renew (false on
expired, true when remaining <= threshold, false on ample remaining,
zero-ttl short-circuit, no-panic on u64::MAX expiry, exact-boundary
behaviour).

All 13 pass in <0.01s.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
